name: Verifiable Self-Evolution for Open-Ended Dialogue Skills via Future-Feedback Prediction
summary: arXiv:2607.18973v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Textual skills provide a lightweight way to improve frozen language-model agents, but their self-evolution normally requires a stable validation si...
description: arXiv:2607.18973v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Textual skills provide a lightweight way to improve frozen language-model agents, but their self-evolution normally requires a stable validation signal. Such signals are natural in mathematics or code, where an answer can be checked after it changes, yet are problematic in open-ended dialogue: changing the assistant response also changes the use...
author: ChaoJin Zhao, Xuan Jiang
